FlavourText.original: Bow before her... or suffer the most gruelling death imaginable.
FlavourText.zh_cn: 跪伏于她脚下……否则，就等着领教世间最磨人的死法。
FlavourText.zh_tw: 向她俯首……否則便承受世間最嚴酷的死亡。

group.original: {0} to Level of all [Corrupted|Corrupted] [Spell|Spell] Skill Gems

translation.zh_cn: 所有[Corrupted|腐化][Spell|法术]技能宝石等级提高 {0}
translation.zh_tw: {0} 全部[Corrupted|腐化][Spell|法術]技能寶石

group.original: Spells which cost Life [Gain|Gain] {0}% of Damage as [Extra|Extra] [Physical|Physical] Damage

translation.zh_cn: 消耗生命的法术[Gain|获得] {0}% 的[Extra|额外][Physical|物理]伤害
translation.zh_tw: 消耗生命施放的法術[Gain|獲得] {0}% 傷害的[Extra|額外][Physical|物理]傷害

group.original: {0}% chance for [Spell|Spell] Skills to fire {1} additional [Projectiles|Projectiles]

translation.zh_cn: [Spell|法术]技能有 {0}% 的几率发射 {1} 个额外[Projectiles|投射物]
translation.zh_tw: [Spell|法術]技能有 {0}% 機率發射額外 {1} 個[Projectiles|投射物]
增加 {0}% 生命消耗[Efficiency|效率]

group.original: {0}% of Maximum Life [Converted|Converted] to [Energy Shield|Energy Shield]

translation.zh_cn: {0}% 的最大生命转[Converted|化为][Energy Shield|能量护盾]
translation.zh_tw: {0}% 最大生命[Converted|轉換]為[Energy Shield|能量護盾]

group.original: {0}% of [Spell|Spell] Damage [Leeched as Life|Leeched as Life]

translation.zh_cn: [Spell|法术]伤害的 {0}% 转化为[Leeched as Life|生命偷取]
translation.zh_tw: [Spell|法術]傷害的 {0}% 轉化為[Leeched as Life|生命偷取]
